My Maternal 20th. Great Grandmother, Morna "Morba" MacDougall (MacKenzie)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Name: Morna MacDougall, daughter of Eoghan "Ewan" MacDougall, Lord of Lorne and Eugenia MacDonnchadh
Born: 1244 in Ross and Cromarty, Scotland
Died: March 18, 1293 (45-53) in Canterbury, Kent, England …

associatedMedia.headline: Dunollie Castle, Scotland painting by Sir George Reid
Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Argyll, Scotland
associatedMedia.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

zh.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Morna MacDougall於1244年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，她的父親Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill32歲，母親Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia40歲。她於大約1269年與Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1293年3月18日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年49歲。

zh-hans.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Morna MacDougall于1244年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾时，她的父亲Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill32岁，母亲Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia40岁。她于大约1269年与Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1293年3月18日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Morna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Muirne, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’; borne by Fingal's mother in the Ossianic poems of James Macpherson ( compare Malvina ).

variants.name: Myrna
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Muirne , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. It is associated with the American film star  Myrna Loy  (  1905–93 ).

variants.name: Muirne
meanings: Traditional name, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Morna MacDougall was born in 1244, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, her father, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, was 32 and her mother, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, was 40. She married Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail about 1269, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 March 1293, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Morna MacDougall est née en 1244, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail environ 1269, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1293, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Sie hat um 1269 in Scotland Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 18. März 1293 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Morna MacDougall(이)가 1244년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1269년 스컷랜드에서 Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 3월 18일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Morna MacDougall nasceu em 1244, em Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail aproximadamente 1269, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1293, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyllshire, Scot: обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Morna MacDougall родилась в 1244 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kenneth MacKenzie 1st Laird of Kintail около 1269 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 марта 1293 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.
